# Peer Reject

> AI-powered grant rejection simulator. Upload a research proposal (PDF) and receive adversarial reviews from parallel K2 Think V2 agents in under 2 minutes.

## What it does

- Simulates an adversarial grant review committee using AI
- Runs 3–7 specialized reviewer agents simultaneously (Methodology, Budget, Novelty, Domain, Presentation, Statistical Rigor, Survey Completeness)
- Produces: formal rejection letter, severity-ranked weakness report (Fatal / Major / Minor), numbered fix recommendations, and a revised abstract
- Powered by MBZUAI / IFM K2 Think V2 reasoning model — a frontier chain-of-thought reasoning model

## Who it's for

Researchers, academics, and PhD students submitting grant proposals or papers who want to discover fatal flaws before the real committee does.

## Key facts

- Review time: ~120 seconds end-to-end
- Agent types: 7 active (Methodology, Budget & Feasibility, Novelty, Domain Expert, Presentation, Statistical Rigor, Survey Completeness), 2 coming soon (Ethics & Compliance, Reproducibility)
- Output sections: 4 — Decision Letter, Identified Weaknesses, How to Fix It, Revised Abstract
- Document types supported: Grant proposals, journal papers, clinical trials, theses, surveys, conference papers, position papers, technical reports
- Severity tiers: Fatal (blocks funding), Major (requires significant revision), Minor (polish-level issues)
- Input: PDF upload, up to 10 MB
- No login required, stateless, session-based

## Technology

- K2 Think V2 by MBZUAI / IFM Research Institute
- Streaming SSE — reviews stream token-by-token in real-time
- Built for the Build with K2 Think V2 competition

## Source

https://peer-reject.vercel.app/
